title: Vegan't Meat Fields
description: Grow any vanilla meat from a crop, side effects may be unsanitary.
body:
Ever wanted to have meat in this game but don't want to kill any animals?
What if you could just grow it from an eldritch crop from annother universe.

Just head out to a mushroom fields near you and wait soon you can have all the meat you every need without killing animals intentionally.
Please do note that while the meat does spread slowly it will get out of hand if you don't block off it off from other dirt blocks.

Just be warned, the meat spread it's incursion.
